description: Module add applied — Newsletter, which needs customer-side setup (Resend sender email + Manager invite); £49 setup + £9/mo, sub went from £16 → £25

values.setupInstructions:
• Confirm the sender email address (looks like news@yourdomain)
  • Invite our ops email as a Resend team member so we can
    publish your sends on your behalf

expected.subject: Newsletter is live on your account
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Good news — Newsletter is now active on your account.

What just landed on your bill:
  • One-off setup for Newsletter: £49
    (already added to the invoice you just paid)
  • Module subscription: +£9/month

Your subscription:
  • Before: £16/month
  • Now:    £25/month (+£9)

One small thing — Newsletter needs a quick set-up step
from you before it lights up on the live site. Click the
button below and you'll land straight on the set-up page for
this module (it's the same page you used during onboarding,
focused on just Newsletter).

  • Confirm the sender email address (looks like news@yourdomain)
  • Invite our ops email as a Resend team member so we can
    publish your sends on your behalf

You can come back to it any time from your dashboard — there
will be a "Set up →" button next to Newsletter until the
set-up is complete.

Any questions, hit reply.

— ModuForge
